description: Declarative HUD/feedback model for the Collect-and-Exit demo. Each row binds an objective flag to a read-only HUD display; win/lose game-state is derived from the same flags. The model reuses the existing scene HUD entities and runtime audio/visual feedback paths; it adds no new assets and no engine surface.

feedback.note: The key entity is hidden on pickup via the existing runtime hideEntity trigger action.
Reuses the existing collect.ogg audio intent (intent-only, muted browser playback); no new audio asset is added.

boundary: Declarative read-only HUD/feedback model only. Reuses existing scene HUD entities and runtime feedback paths; adds no new assets, no engine surface, no trusted browser write, no production/native/store export, and no full Godot parity or replacement claim.
